title: Lack of parameter expansion causing warnings

features.name: parameter expression in for loop condition inside always_comb
features.description: Code should include a for loop with an index variable used in the condition, where the upper bound is a parameter with an expression, inside an always_comb block
features.snippet:
localparam FOO = 3 + 1;
always_comb begin
for (int i=0; i<FOO; i=i+1) begin
end
end
